title: Peanut Banana Puree
steps: Mash the banana in a bowl until smooth.
Stir in the peanut butter until fully combined.
Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
serving_guidance: Offer a small amount (1/4 tsp peanut butter) mixed into food on day 1. Increase gradually if no reaction.
notes: Always use smooth, unsalted peanut butter with no added sugar.

title: Scrambled Egg Puree
steps: Whisk egg with breast milk or formula until combined.
Cook in a non-stick pan over low heat, stirring constantly, until fully set.
Blend or mash to a smooth consistency suitable for baby's stage.
serving_guidance: Offer a small amount (1 tsp) on day 1. Increase to a full serving if no reaction after 3 days.
notes: Always cook egg fully — no runny yolk for babies under 12 months.
